title: Ella Rock Sunrise Hike
subtitle: Conquer Ella's highest peak to witness a breathtaking morning sunrise
shortDescription: An early morning 11km trek to the 1,350m summit of Ella Rock. Witness a spectacular sunrise over the misty hills, led by an experienced guide.
description1: The highest peak in the Ella area is Ella Rock. It is located at an altitude of 1350 meters (4429 feet) above sea level. Watching the sunrise in the morning is a very beautiful sight. Many people who visit Ella come for this hiking experience and to watch the sunrise. To successfully complete this early morning hiking activity, the assistance of an experienced guide is required.
description2: Kick off your adventure at 04:30 AM from Ella City center to beat the morning heat and reach the peak just in time for dawn. Ascending to 1,350 meters above sea level, you will navigate through serene railway paths and lush tea trails. At the summit, watch the landscape light up with the golden hues of a Sri Lankan sunrise before making your descent back to town by 09:30 AM.
highlights: Spectacular sunrise views from 1,350m above sea level
Led by an experienced local guide
Hike through scenic rail tracks and misty tea estates
Fresh morning air and panoramic valley photography
included: All trail navigation and safety briefing

itinerary.activity: Meet at Ella City center, briefing and headcount
Commence trek along the railway line and tea plantation paths
Reach Ella Rock summit to witness the spectacular sunrise
Begin descent, exploring viewpoint lookouts along the way
Arrive back in Ella City center (End of trek)

title: One Day Hike Ella
subtitle: A premium guided loop through Ella's greatest highlights
shortDescription: A comprehensive 20km trek covering Nine Arch Bridge, Ella Rock, Kithalella Waterfall, and Ravana Cave & Temple, led by expert guides with emergency support.
description1: The Ella area is a tourist attraction with a lot of breathtaking views. This hiking activity is 15.4km long and is led by a skilled guide. An emergency unit is ready to provide services at any time.
description2: Your journey begins in Ella City at 08:00 AM, wrapping up around 03:00 PM. Along the grand 20km loop, you will hike through active tea plantations, cross the historical Nine Arch Bridge, ascend the iconic Ella Rock summit, rest near the cooling Kithalella Waterfall, and explore the ancient Ravana Cave and Temple. An emergency support vehicle is stationed nearby to ensure a safe and relaxing experience.
highlights: Guided by a certified local expert
Emergency medical unit ready at any time
Cover 4 major Ella landmarks in one day
Traditional trail snacks and lunch included
Hike Nine Arch Bridge, Ella Rock, Kithalella Waterfall & Ravana Cave

itinerary.activity: Start from Ella City center, briefing and safety check
Cross the Nine Arch Bridge, photo session
Hike through Kithalella Waterfall and surrounding tea paths
Reach Ella Rock Summit, panoramic picnic lunch
Descend and explore ancient Ravana Cave & Temple
Return to Ella City (End of trek)

title: Waterfall Ride
subtitle: Discover Sri Lanka's tallest and most beautiful waterfalls in a single day
shortDescription: An epic 192km regional journey covering Bomburu Ella, Bambrakanda, Diyaluma, and Ravana Waterfalls with customizable transport options.
description1: Some of the most spectacular waterfalls in Sri Lanka are located in this region. Many people still don’t know that it is possible to visit several waterfalls in one day. The special thing is that among these few waterfalls, not only the highest waterfall and the second highest waterfall in Sri Lanka, but also the most beautiful waterfall in Sri Lanka is located. Our experienced guide will cover these waterfalls in one day. We also have various modes of transportation and you can choose what you want.
description2: Set out on an immersive 12-hour chase covering 192km of winding hill-country roads. This tour takes you to Sri Lanka's heavy hitters: Bambrakanda (the tallest), Diyaluma (the second tallest), Bomburu Ella (the widest/most beautiful), and the iconic Ravana Waterfall. Travel in comfort using your choice of vehicle—from open-air tuk-tuks and motorbikes to comfortable vans, cars, or rugged safari jeeps—all accompanied by an expert local guide.
highlights: Visit Sri Lanka's highest (Bambrakanda) and second highest (Diyaluma) waterfalls
See Bomburu Ella, widely considered the most beautiful waterfall in the country
Fully customizable transport options tailored to your preference
Led by a knowledgeable and local expert guide
included: Bottled water and refreshing King Coconut drink

itinerary.activity: Pick up from Ella City center in your chosen transport vehicle
Arrive at Bomburu Ella Waterfall for a morning exploration
Visit Bambrakanda Waterfall, the tallest cascade in Sri Lanka
Travel to Diyaluma Waterfall, enjoy a picnic lunch and optional dip
Stop by the roadside Ravana Waterfall for evening photography
Return drop-off at Ella City center (End of tour)
